sourcesContent:
import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import { foods } from "../data/foods"; import FoodCard from "../components/FoodCard"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; console.log("HOME PAGE LOADED"); export default function Home() { const [backendMessage, setBackendMessage] = useState("Loading..."); useEffect(() => { fetch("http://localhost:8080/api/test") .then((res) => res.text()) .then((data) => { console.log("FROM BACKEND:", data); setBackendMessage(data); }) .catch((err) => { console.error("ERROR:", err); setBackendMessage("Backend NOT connected"); }); }, []); return ( {/* 🔴 TEST MESSAGE (to confirm file is loading) */}

TEST MESSAGE

{/* 🔥 Backend status */}

Backend Status:

{backendMessage}

Delicious food, delivered fast

Browse our menu and add your favorites to the cart.

Menu

{foods.map((food) => ( ))}
); }
